subcodes.first_line: This is the remembrance of God unto His servant, that he may thereby be filled with joy. O Gracious One! Hearken unto the call of this Prisoner, for He hath heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عبده لیکون بذکره مسرورا ان یا کریم اسمع ندآء هذا المسجون انه سمع
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @praise and encouragement
